title: Project 2025 — New Year intentions, dual-list (this year + life)
html:
Project 2025 — New Year intentions, dual-list (this year + life)

Source: 2025-01-01 Apple Note. Yahir's New Year list — split between annual operating principles and life-time goals. The note that names the 2025 Austin-move thesis explicitly, and that mom house by the river goal cites as one of its four canonical recurrences.

TL;DR

  • 2025 operating principles (the "annual" half): be a good person always; build passion products; keep body default dialed; be at peak frequency thru authenticity; walk with God's eyes, fulfill destiny.
  • 2025 specific goals: move to austin tx; visit Millie in NYC.
  • Life-time goals (the second half): become a millionaire; buy my mom a house by a beautiful river (the recurring vow); find my wife; have a presence on Twitter; have a six pack; take my dad to Istanbul vacation.
  • The label "Project 2025🫡" — Yahir framing his year as a project deliverable, salute emoji included.
  • Bridges the departing China close out note and the rest of the 2025 corpus — this is the document that converts "China chapter ended, what's next" into a written plan.

Key signals

  • The Austin move appears here for the first time as a written commitment. By Aug-Sept 2025 it is reality (2025 08 21 austin goodbye packlist, 2025 09 20 on austin arrival).
  • The list mixes spiritual (walk with gods eyes, "destiny") with material (millionaire, six-pack, Twitter presence) without flinching — characteristic of Yahir's voice.
  • "Find my wife" predates by ~10 months the Emily-arc captured in 2025 10 28 exactly what i want emily, 2025 09 25 the manner that emily trails her words is eerily similar to, and the emily stevens call notes.
  • "Take my dad to Istanbul" — first appearance of an Istanbul/Turkey travel goal in the corpus; pairs with dad wisdom and the recurring concern about dad's health.

Pattern observed

Yahir's intentions lists are non-deniable about what he wants. There's no hedging language ("I'd like to" / "maybe I'll"). The verbs are direct: be, build, keep, move, visit, become, buy, find, have, take. Compare to the Jan 2026 "intense fire" mantra — same syntactic register, same refusal to soften.

This note is also the canonical citation for "Project 2025" as a phrase in the vault — when Yahir later says "Project 2025" he means this list, not the U.S. political thing.

Open questions

  • Of the 2025 specific goals: Austin → done, Millie/NYC → did this happen?
  • Of the life-time goals at year-end 2025: which moved? Six-pack and Twitter presence are tracked in his fitness/build patterns; "find my wife" is the live thread by Q4 2025.

Related

  • walk with gods eyes
  • passion products
  • 2024 12 14 departing china
  • 2025 05 21 austin move plan
